questionHtml:
Photons of discrete energy are emitted during gamma decay. This is evidence for

A. atomic energy levels.

B. nuclear energy levels.

C. pair annihilation.

D. quantum tunneling.

meta.title: Photons of discrete energy are emitted during gamma decay. This is evidence for A. atomic energy levels. B. nuclear energy levels. C. pair annihilation. D. quantum tunneling.
